title: Authz Negative Test Plan
description: Design focused deny tests for role, owner, tenant, unauthenticated, expired, and malformed access paths.
body: Inputs: endpoint or service boundary, available fixtures, and current policy expectations. Use for authorization changes or reviews. Do not use when the task only changes authentication plumbing without resource access. Procedure: build a minimal matrix, select the highest-risk deny cells, add one allowed control case, assert both status and response body, and run the narrowest test command. Output: test cases and command evidence. Validation signals include denied access without sensitive payloads. Human gate: unresolved policy ambiguity or missing fixtures for tenant isolation.
